product.headline: Your personalized skincare routine
product.subheadline: DeepSkyn offers a complete range of skincare products for men and women: cleansers, moisturizers, serums, and masks tailored to all skin types.
product.description: Trusted by thousands of users, DeepSkyn provides dermatologically tested skincare formulated with natural ingredients for radiant skin.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Discover our skincare subscriptions tailored to your needs. All plans include AI skin analysis and mobile app access.

items.q1: What is DeepSkyn and how does the app work?
items.a1: DeepSkyn is your personalized beauty assistant that analyzes your skin type using artificial intelligence to provide a tailored skincare routine. Download the app, answer a few questions, and receive recommendations. Our formulas are designed for both men and women, using natural ingredients.
items.q2: How does DeepSkyn personalize my skincare routine?
items.a2: Our AI analysis examines your skin type, concerns (acne, wrinkles, dryness, etc.), and goals. The algorithm then creates a custom routine with the most suitable products. Products are dermatologically tested and formulated without parabens. You keep full control and can adjust your routine anytime.
items.q3: What are the pricing options and how do I order?
items.a3: Getting started is simple: download the app, complete your free skin diagnosis, then choose from our 3 plans: Essential ($39/month), Premium ($89/month), or Luxury ($199/month). All plans include free shipping, AI analysis, and personalized tracking. Save 17% on annual subscriptions.

preview.defaultText: Start your journey to healthier skin today.

welcome.title: Welcome to DeepSkyn
welcome.subtitle: Your journey to glowing skin begins here
welcome.description: DeepSkyn uses artificial intelligence to revolutionize your beauty routine. Follow this guide to discover how to transform your skin.

quiz.title: Intelligent Diagnostic
quiz.subtitle: Getting to know your skin
quiz.description: Take our intelligent questionnaire. Our algorithms analyze your habits and specific needs for an ultra-precise profile.

analysis.title: AI Skin Analysis
analysis.subtitle: Visualize your progress scientifically
analysis.description: Access key indicators (hydration, sensitivity, radiance). Track your skin's evolution with our high-definition scans.

routines.title: Your Action Plan
routines.subtitle: Efficiency, step by step
routines.description: Receive a personalized skincare routine. Morning and night, let us guide you to apply the right products in the right order.

products.title: Selective Shopping
products.subtitle: Only the best for you
products.description: Discover a selection of products recommended by our experts based on your unique skin analysis.

achievements.title: Rewards & Progress
achievements.subtitle: Celebrate every victory
achievements.description: Unlock exclusive badges by staying consistent. The more you take care of yourself, the more you progress in the DeepSkyn ecosystem.

profile.title: Your Personal Space
profile.subtitle: Total control, simplified
profile.description: Manage your preferences, update your profile, and access DeepSkyn support in one click.

caseStudies.title: Customer Success Stories

eightball.title: EightBall relies on Auralink to track team health metrics and async communication quality.
eightball.quote: Auralink transformed how we understand our remote-first culture.

coreos.title: CoreOS uses Auralink to ensure design and engineering teams stay in sync during sprints.
coreos.quote: The sentiment analysis helps us identify friction points before they become blockers.

comparison.title: Old/New comparison
comparison.tinyDatasetWarning: Very small dataset (<= 3 series): values like MAE = 0.000 can appear but are statistically unreliable.

jobLogs.title: Job logs
jobLogs.noActive: No active job. Start a training run to view logs here.
jobLogs.persistMessage: State is preserved after refresh. Waiting and streaming logs...

errors.jobMissing: Job no longer exists (server restarted or state was purged). Start training again.

tips.shape: Number of training examples x number of features (trainSeries x inputCols).
tips.shapeMl: Compact view: users x trainSeries x inputCols.
tips.datasetSize: Number of series used to train the model.
tips.strictTestMae: Mean absolute error on strict temporal test split. Lower is better.
tips.temporalCvMae: Mean absolute error on rolling-origin temporal cross-validation. Lower is better.
tips.strictTestMaeShort: Mean absolute error on strict temporal test split. Lower = better precision.
tips.temporalCvMaeShort: Mean absolute error on temporal CV. Lower = better generalization.
tips.datasetShape: trainSeries x inputCols (training examples x input variables).
tips.datasetShapeMl: users x trainSeries x inputCols for model-level reading.
